# Great Lakes Oral & Maxillofacial Surgery Centre

> Specialized oral and maxillofacial surgery practice located in Tecumseh, Ontario, serving Windsor and Essex County. Phone: 519-979-7227. Address: 1825 Manning Road, Studio 700, Tecumseh, ON, N9K 0A9.

## Our Surgeons

### Dr. Mark Shuren — DDS, FRCD(C), Dip. ABOMS
Board-certified oral and maxillofacial surgeon practicing in Windsor and Essex County since 1996. Graduated from McGill University School of Dentistry (1991) and completed his Oral and Maxillofacial Surgery residency at the Medical Center of Delaware (1996). Diplomate of the American Board of Oral and Maxillofacial Surgery (board certified 1999, re-certified 2010). Fellow of the Royal College of Dentists of Canada. Adjunct Clinical Professor at Western University Schulich School of Medicine and Dentistry. First director and instructor of Advanced Cardiac Life Support (ACLS) in Essex County. National Board Examiner in Oral and Maxillofacial Surgery.

### Dr. Richard Stapleford — DDS, FRCD(C), Dip. ABOMS
Board-certified oral and maxillofacial surgeon with over 30 years of specialty practice in Windsor and Essex County. Chief of Oral and Maxillofacial Surgery and Dentistry at Windsor Regional Hospitals (Ouellette and Metropolitan Campus). Adjunct Clinical Professor at UWO Schulich School of Medicine and Dentistry. Consultant at Windsor Regional Cancer Treatment Centre and John McGivney Children's Centre Maxillofacial Cleft Palate Clinic. Thesis Examiner, School of Graduate Studies, Western University. Trained at University of Western Ontario, University of Toronto, and Henry Ford Hospital (Detroit). Awards include the Ontario Society of Oral and Maxillofacial Surgeons Award of Merit and the Schulich School Teaching Recognition Award.

## Services Offered
- [Dental Implants](https://www.greatlakessurgerycentre.com/surgery/dental-implants)
- [Wisdom Teeth Removal](https://www.greatlakessurgerycentre.com/surgery/wisdom-teeth)
- [Tooth Extraction](https://www.greatlakessurgerycentre.com/surgery/tooth-extraction)
- [Bone Grafting](https://www.greatlakessurgerycentre.com/surgery/bone-grafting)
- [Orthodontic Surgery](https://www.greatlakessurgerycentre.com/surgery/orthodontic-surgery)
- [Facial Trauma](https://www.greatlakessurgerycentre.com/surgery/facial-trauma)
- [Oral Pathology](https://www.greatlakessurgerycentre.com/surgery/oral-pathology)
- [Corrective Jaw Surgery](https://www.greatlakessurgerycentre.com/surgery/jaw-corrective)
- [TMJ Disorder Treatment](https://www.greatlakessurgerycentre.com/surgery/tmj-disorder)

- [After Wisdom Tooth Removal](https://www.greatlakessurgerycentre.com/after-surgery/wisdom-teeth-removal)
- [After Tooth Extraction](https://www.greatlakessurgerycentre.com/after-surgery/tooth-removal)
- [After Removal of Multiple Teeth](https://www.greatlakessurgerycentre.com/after-surgery/removal-of-multiple-teeth)
- [After Dental Implant Placement](https://www.greatlakessurgerycentre.com/after-surgery/placement-of-dental-implants)
- [After Exposure of Impacted Tooth](https://www.greatlakessurgerycentre.com/after-surgery/exposure-of-impacted-tooth)
- [After Facial Trauma](https://www.greatlakessurgerycentre.com/after-surgery/facial-trauma)

## Practice Details
- Hours: Monday–Thursday 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM, Friday 8:00 AM – 3:00 PM
- Phone: 519-979-7227
- Fax: 519-979-1956
- Address: 1825 Manning Road, Studio 700, Tecumseh, ON, N9K 0A9
- Serving: Windsor, Tecumseh, and Essex County, Ontario, Canada
- Hospital affiliations: Windsor Regional Hospital (Ouellette & Metropolitan Campus), Hotel Dieu Hospital
